text: My app just like totally freezes! And I can't even remember when it started. Plus, the battery life has been weird too, like it drains so fast. Help!
Hey, I'm really confused! Is the pro plan billed every month or just once a year? I'm kinda stressed about it!
Hey, I need a refund for my last order. It wasn't what I expected.
hey, I can't log in anymore. the password is right but it says no and I dunno why. help!

Hey, so I've been trying to upload this huge file for my project, and it just won't go through. I have like a million tabs open, and I'm pretty sure my cat walked on my keyboard earlier, but I don't think that should affect it, right? Any chance there's a limit I don't know about?

I recently purchased an upgrade for my subscription, but I’m really frustrated because it seems that the additional features are still not accessible. I was expecting everything to be unlocked immediately after the payment went through. Can someone explain why this is happening? It’s quite disappointing!

Hi there, I’ve been trying to find some information about how to cancel a subscription, but I can't seem to find anything specific on your website. Is there a particular process I should follow, or can you point me to where I can get more details? Thanks!

Hey there, I really need help with my acccount, it seems like im locked out and I can't reset my password or anything. I tried multiple times, but it just won't let me in. It's really frustratng because I have important stuff I need to access!

I’m really disappointed with the service I received recently, especially since I had such high hopes. It seems like every time I reach out, there’s always something wrong, which is frustrating. I had to wait for what felt like an eternity, and then when I finally got through, the representative didn’t seem to understand my issue. I mean, it’s not rocket science! Can you please address this and let me know how it can be improved? Also, my neighbor’s dog barked the entire time I was on hold, which didn’t help either.
Dear support team, I am experiencing an issue where the application fails to load completely after I attempt to sign in. It just hangs indefinitely. Can you please assist me?
can't access my account. forgot the password but no recovery email. what now?
I'm really frustrated! The app keeps crashing whenever I try to upload my photos. It’s so annoying!

Hi there, I really need some help because my accout got hacked and I think someone has changed my password. I can't seem to log in anymore, and I'm not sure what to do next. Can you please assist me in recovering my account? Thank you!
I love your product, but why does it take so long to ship? I’ve been eagerly waiting for it, and I even canceled plans just to be home when it arrives. Can you help me understand the delay?
Can you tell me why my order hasn’t shipped yet? Also, where can I find the best pizza in town?

Dear Customer Support, I would like to request a refund for the item I purchased. Unfortunately, it arrived in the wrong size. I would prefer a full refund rather than a store credit. Thank you for your assistance.
